_comment: Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/Ureteric reimplantation/ : Ureteric reimplantation_Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + Ureteric reimplantation_PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code.

preauth.label: Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management
CT-Intravenous pyelogram (IVP) /MRI Urogram + Micturating Cysto-urethrogram (MCU) CT-IVP/MRI Urogram report

ppd_preauth.q: Was the Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management submitted?
Was the CT-Intravenous pyelogram (IVP) /MRI Urogram + Micturating Cysto-urethrogram (MCU) CT-IVP/MRI Urogram report submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed Indoor case papers submitted?
Was the Detailed Procedure/Operative notes submitted?
Was the Intra-operative clinical photograph submitted? (Optional)
Was the Detailed discharge summary submitted?

common_queries: Clinical manifestations (strong, persistent urge to urinate, burning sensation, urine inconsistency, cloudy urine, or flank/abdomen pain) not documented to support diagnosis.
Patient does not present with a documented history of UTI or urinary inconsistence, without justification for proceeding with the procedure.
CT-Intravenous pyelogram (IVP)/MRI Urogram or Micturating Cysto-urethrogram (MCU) report not submitted or incomplete at pre-authorization stage.
Detailed Operative notes/Procedure notes not submitted or incomplete at claim submission stage.
Intra-operative Clinical Photograph not submitted, or missing critical details (e.g., patient ID, procedure context).
